name: syncthing
title: Syncthing
description: Deep integration of Raycast into Syncthing.

commands.name: list-devices
commands.title: List Devices
commands.description: Lists all currently available Syncthing devices, along with their connection status.
commands.subtitle: All current devices

commands.name: list-folders
commands.title: List Folders
commands.description: Lists all currently available Syncthing folders, along with their synchronization status.
commands.subtitle: All current folders

preferences.name: base_url
preferences.title: Syncthing Rest API Base URL
preferences.description: Base URL for Syncthing REST API.

preferences.name: api_key
preferences.title: Syncthing API Key
preferences.description: API key required for interacting with Syncthing.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

author: shashank_prasanna
